description: Run FixedWD with lambda in {5e-4, 6e-4, 7e-4, 8e-4, 1e-3} on ImageNet ResNet-50 (45 epochs, 3 seeds each) to isolate the effective WD inflation confound. This is the single most important missing experiment.

Inspect control experiment code to confirm gradient-norm-only and phase-schedule controls were correctly implemented. The current results are identical to main experiments, suggesting implementation bugs. Re-run all controls on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 (3 seeds).

Add a Budget Equivalence subsection reporting the Bayesian optimization results (EqWD 68.30% vs FixedWD 68.21% under 15-trial search). Reframe EqWD's advantage as 'competitive with default hyperparameters' rather than 'genuinely better adaptive WD'.
Run FixedWD, SWD, and EqWD at 90 epochs on ImageNet with seed 42 to check whether the 45-epoch ranking holds under canonical training.
Run EqWD with beta=5.0 on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 with seeds {42, 123, 456} to validate the single-seed 66.07% finding.
Run all methods (FixedWD, SWD, CWD, EqWD) with AdamW on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 (3 seeds) to validate optimizer generality.
Fix the claim that EqWD has 'lowest standard deviation among all methods' on ImageNet. NoWD (0.153) and CAWD (0.154) have lower std than EqWD (0.197). Qualify the claim appropriately.
Reframe Proposition 2 (ratio sufficiency) as an empirical observation or hypothesis rather than a formal proposition, since the proof is circular and the real evidence comes from the AIS diagnostic.
The AIS diagnostic shows fc.weight has residual_variance_ratio=0.62 (alignment IS informative for the final layer). This exception should be discussed and its implications for EqWD analyzed.
Ensure all standard deviation values are computed from the same source (aggregate JSON) and consistently reported across the paper.
The NoBN experiment produced 1% accuracy across all methods. Either re-run with appropriate learning rate (lr=0.01) or remove from the paper.
